hero.title: A space to breathe, savor, and connect
hero.subtitle: HanaVeg brings not just a meal but exquisite elevation in every moment

intro.title: Discover the pure essence of vegetarian cuisine at HanaVeg
intro.description: Experience a peaceful haven with soulful plant-based cuisine, combining traditional Vietnamese flavors with a modern touch, in a rustic and cozy space right in the heart of the city.

testimonials.title: Customer Reviews
testimonials.subtitle: Discover what our guests feel about their experience at HanaVeg.
testimonials.review1: HanaVeg is truly an ideal stop! A gentle, cozy space and food with traditional characteristics.
testimonials.review2: Super cool vegetarian restaurant. Excellent delicious food, unforgettable taste!
testimonials.review3: Always find peace when enjoying dishes full of love for nature here.

journey.title: A Pure Vegetarian Culinary Journey
journey.subtitle: Return to a rustic vegetarian oasis, where plant-based food radiates sophistication.

card1.title: Quintessential vegetarian food
card1.desc: Immerse yourself in traditional flavors created in a modern style.

card2.title: Nature-facing view
card2.desc: Relax in a lush, quiet space with soft light.

card3.title: Inspiring experience
card3.desc: Enjoy your meal in familiar warmth and gentle music.
